channel.title: Frontiers in Robotics and AI | New and Recent Articles
channel.description: Recent articles from Frontiers in Robotics and AI

item.title: Compliant grasp planning for soft robotic manipulators under uncertain object geometry
item.description: This work proposes a probabilistic grasp-planning framework for soft pneumatic manipulators handling objects with imperfectly known geometry. We model fingertip compliance as a stochastic process and derive closed-form expressions for expected contact wrench under shape uncertainty. Experiments on a four-finger silicone gripper across 120 household objects achieve a 92.4% success rate, outperforming rigid-body baselines by 11.7 percentage points. The method generalizes to deformable targets without retraining and reduces grasp-force overshoot by 38%. Implications for warehouse picking and assistive robotics are discussed.
item.author: Helena Marchetti

item.title: Editorial: Safe human-robot collaboration in shared workspaces
item.author: Editor Name
